title: Hypothesis Testing for Time Series Components
description: A decision flowchart for determining the presence of key components (trend, seasonality) in a time series using statistical tests.
relationships: Start with Time Series Data, apply ADF Test for unit root (non-stationarity), if null hypothesis (presence of unit root) is not rejected, apply KPSS Test for stationarity around a trend. Based on results, conclude presence of Trend. For Seasonality, apply Seasonal Decomposition and examine residuals.
